main-modules/template-page/getting-start.title: Design System
main-modules/template-page/getting-start.content:
# Design System

Use cases

# Design System

> Aether is also perfect for design systems and guidelines
> 

## **Mission Statement**

Our mission is to create the most beautiful documentation template for Super and Notion.

## **Values**

- Minimalism
- Transparency
- Forward-thinking

main-modules/template-page/getting-start.title: Getting Started
main-modules/template-page/getting-start.content:
# Getting Started # Getting Started > Welcome to Aether, to get started all you need is a [Notion](https://affiliate.notion.so/cxvpa1a3ocar) & [Super](https://super.so) account. > ## 1. Duplicate Notion page The first step to using this template is to duplicate this Notion page to your own workspace. Click the button below to open the Notion page. [**Duplicate Notion page**](https://s.super.so/aether) ## 2. Create a Super site Then, head to your [Super dashboard](https://app.super.so) and create a new site using the public URL of your newly duplicated Notion page. [Learn how to do that here.](https://docs.super.site/creating-a-site) ## 3. Add the style snippet Then, head to your site settings (gear icon) and into the code page. Then inside the 'Head' tab, paste the following code snippet. ```html ``` ## 4. Add the script snippet Then inside the 'Body' tab, paste the following code snippet. ```html ``` ## 5. Add a footer and navbar Finally, in your site settings be sure to add a footer and navbar.
💡 And just like magic, you should now see the Aether template in your dashboard preview. There's a few extra quirks to customizing and making the most out of the Aether template, check the **'Using Aether'** page to learn more ↓
Next → [Using Aether](https://www.notion.so/8fa99420c5c04ff8b06967b8815fbcaf?pvs=21)
